title: NewCo Segment Input Schema
description: Per-segment CSV row schema for the investment scoping calculator. v0.1.

estate.description: IEAT estate name. Must match a key in parameters.ESTATE_AREA_RAI.

typology.description: Per Annex H. T1 invalid at Lat Krabang and Lamphun (land-lease).

area_m2.description: Available surface area in m². Required for PV typologies.

kwh_capacity.description: BESS capacity in kWh. Required for BESS typology.

kwp_dc.description: Pre-computed DC nameplate. If provided, overrides derivation from area_m2.

tenant_name.description: Tenant entity name. Required when offtaker_type is tenant or mixed.

tenant_tier.description: Per NC-METH-001 Annex G credit grading. Defaults to C if missing for tenant rows.

unit_cost_override.description: Override $/kWp for this segment. If null, use CAPEX_BY_TYPOLOGY default.

suitability_score.description: Composite per Annex G §3.4. 0=excluded, 4=ideal. Defaults to 3.
